title: Puma: stats
description: Periodic Puma web server statistics snapshot emitted by the Honeybadger Puma plugin. In cluster mode one event is emitted per worker; in single mode one event per cycle. Fields come directly from Puma.stats.

worker.description: Worker index in cluster mode. Absent in single mode.

pool_capacity.description: Number of threads available to pick up new requests.

max_threads.description: Maximum number of threads configured for this worker.

requests_count.description: Total requests processed by this worker since start.

backlog.description: Number of connections waiting for a thread.

request_id.description: Rails request UUID, present on any event fired during a web request context. Merged globally by the Honeybadger agent.
